findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Find Django FileInput widget classes
 * @description Finds FileInput class definitions in Django
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/find-django-fileinput-classes
 * @tags files
 *       input
 *       security
 */

import python

from Class cls, string className
where
  className = cls.getName()
  and className.matches("FileInput")
select cls, "FileInput class found: " + className
findings.hypothesis: Find FileInput widget classes to understand file upload handling structure

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Analyze FileInput class structure
 * @description Examine the FileInput class for attributes and methods
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/analyze-fileinput-class
 * @tags files
 *       input
 *       security
 */

import python

// Find the FileInput class
from Class cls
where cls.getName() = "FileInput"
select cls, "FileInput class definition found"
findings.hypothesis: Examine FileInput class structure for file upload handling

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Examine FileInput class structure
 * @description Analyze the FileInput class methods and attributes
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity recommendation
 * @id py/examine-fileinput-class
 * @tags files
 *       input
 *       security
 */

import python

from Class cls, string className, string methods
where
  className = cls.getName()
  and className = "FileInput"
  and methods = cls.getAMethod().getName()
select cls, "FileInput class found with method: " + methods
findings.hypothesis: Examine FileInput class methods to understand file upload handling

message.text:
FileInput class found with method: format_value
FileInput class found with method: value_from_datadict
FileInput class found with method: value_omitted_from_data
FileInput class found with method: use_required_attribute
